author: Haakon Wibe
description: Detect installations of Firefox and Brave browsers - useful for compliance and software inventory
notes: Uses 'NotExists' comparison to detect if browsers are installed (non-compliant if found).
Checks both machine-wide and per-user installation locations.
Brave typically installs per-user, Firefox can be either.
Modify comparison to 'Exists' if you want to REQUIRE these browsers instead of block them.

settings.name: Firefox Not Installed (Machine)
settings.description: Detect if Mozilla Firefox is installed machine-wide

settings.name: Firefox Not Installed (32-bit on 64-bit)
settings.description: Detect if Mozilla Firefox 32-bit is installed on 64-bit Windows

settings.name: Brave Not Installed (Machine)
settings.description: Detect if Brave Browser is installed machine-wide

settings.name: Brave Not Installed (User)
settings.description: Detect if Brave Browser is installed per-user (common installation method)
